{{Infobox location
| name = Pioneer 602
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pioneer 602]] is a world where the population is expected to die within weeks.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pioneer 602]] is a world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pioneer 602]] is more like a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] on its last wisps of energy.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pioneer 602]] is a world that experienced a whirlpool effect in its grain fields.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|If Pioneer 602 died due to “natural” causes, that would be a different case entirely.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
